seo.title: The Dragon Chants | OpenG7
seo.description: Soon discover OpenG7’s musical universe, its chants, creations, and news from the Realm.

hero.backgroundAlt: Golden dragon and luminous fortress in the OpenG7 universe
hero.title: The Dragon Chants
hero.copy: Chants born from faith, resilience, creation, and unity. A new musical experience will soon come to life at the heart of OpenG7.

album.title: First OpenG7 album
album.disabledButton: Listen to the album — Coming soon

community.title: Community voices

cta.title: The Dragon is preparing its chants.
cta.copy: Come back soon to discover the first musical works of OpenG7.

seo.title: NorthDragon Shop | OpenG7
seo.description: Discover the NorthDragon shop, its clothing, accessories, and creations inspired by strength, faith, resilience, and transformation.

hero.backgroundAlt: Golden dragon and castle under dark skies for the NorthDragon universe
hero.title: NorthDragon Shop
hero.subtitle: Creations inspired by strength, faith, resilience, and inner nobility.
hero.copy: Discover clothing, accessories, and exclusive creations designed for those who carry their story with courage.

signature.description: Pieces to wear like soft armor, between restraint and presence.

accessories.description: Visual complements that extend the NorthDragon identity every day.

symbolic.description: Editorial previews around rebirth, faith, and transformation.

brand.title: NorthDragon — Born to rise again
brand.copy: NorthDragon is more than a shop: it is a signature. A universe inspired by the dragon, nobility, resilience, faith, and transformation. Every creation carries inner strength: the courage to rise again, the beauty of standing back up, and the elegance of moving forward with power.
brand.quote: “Wear your story. Move forward with power.”

ecosystem.title: A creation of the OpenG7 ecosystem
ecosystem.copy: NorthDragon represents the creative, symbolic, and commercial dimension of the OpenG7 ecosystem. The shop helps bring its creations, stories, and projects to life.

cta.title: Enter the NorthDragon universe
cta.copy: Discover creations designed to represent strength, transformation, and restored light.

campaign.title: Builders Fund
